tools.name: files_read
tools.description: Read the contents of a file.

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root

tools.name: files_read_lines
tools.description: Read a range of lines from a file with line numbers.

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root

start_line.description: Line number to start reading at (1-indexed, inclusive)

end_line.description: Line number to end reading at (1-indexed, inclusive). When omitted, reads from start_line to the end of the file.

tools.name: files_list
tools.description: List files and directories at a given path. When an AGENTS.md file exists in the listed directory, its contents are automatically appended to the listing.

path.description: Directory path relative to the sandbox root

long.description: Show detailed format with permissions, size, and dates

tools.name: files_search
tools.description: Search file contents for a pattern using grep. Returns matching lines with context.

path.description: File or directory path relative to the sandbox root

recursive.description: Search directories recursively. On by default — set to false only when searching a single file path.

files_with_matches.description: Show only file names that contain matches, not the matching lines

tools.name: files_write
tools.description: Write content to a file. Creates the file if it does not exist, overwrites if it does. Parent directories are created automatically if they do not exist.

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root

content.description: Content to write to the file

tools.name: files_write_lines
tools.description: Replace a range of lines in a file without rewriting the entire file.

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root

start_line.description: Line number to start replacing at (1-indexed, inclusive)

end_line.description: Line number to end replacing at (1-indexed, inclusive). Defaults to start_line (single line replacement) if omitted.

original_content.description: The content currently at [start_line, end_line]. The tool verifies this matches the file before applying the patch. If the only difference is trailing whitespace, the file's original trailing whitespace is preserved in the replacement. If it doesn't match, the edit is rejected with the expected vs actual content — re-read the file and retry.

content.description: Replacement content for the specified line range

tools.name: files_replace
tools.description: Replace all occurrences of a pattern in a file. Supports capture groups ($1-$9) in the replacement string. Returns a diff of changes made. The pattern is matched against the full file content with multiline mode enabled (^ and $ match line boundaries).

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root

pattern.description: Search pattern (regex by default, literal when literal: true). Multiline mode: ^ and $ match line boundaries. For multi-line patterns, include actual newlines.

replacement.description: Replacement string. Supports $1-$9 for capture group references (regex mode with capture groups only). Use $$ for a literal $ when the pattern has capture groups. Use an empty string to delete matches. For multi-line replacements, include actual newlines.

max_replacements.description: Maximum number of replacements to apply. 0 (default) means unlimited.

literal.description: Treat the pattern as literal text instead of regex. Default: false.

line_number.description: Show line numbers in the returned diff (default: true)

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root

tools.name: files_delete_dir
tools.description: Delete an empty directory. Refuses to delete non-empty directories.

path.description: Directory path relative to the sandbox root

hintConditions.hint: file not found — use files_list to list available files

execution.truncationHint: output truncated: {kept} of {total} lines shown; {omitted} more lines available. To continue reading, use files_read_lines with start_line: {next_start}; omit end_line to read the rest.

hintConditions.hint: file not found — use files_list to list available files
file deleted — verify this was intended
directory deleted — verify this was intended
